title: Remove Columns for Drill-down/Split-view in Charts
excerpt: Hi, would it be possible to have it where you can choose which columns are displayed when in split view on dashboards. I’ve recently noticed when using drill down on charts it displays the entire board as opposed to the …

posts.author: KieranBiscoe (Kieran)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, would it be possible to have it where you can choose which columns are displayed when in split view on dashboards. I’ve recently noticed when using drill down on charts it displays the entire board as opposed to the few columns the chart actually references.
